title: Create Nuclear: Easy Rods
body: Uranium and graphite rods are able to be duplicated through a crafting recipe. Create Nuclear is required to use this. By using this mod it makes it a lot easier to run your nuclear reactor. You can use this mod in any modpacks. This mod is perfect for if you don't want to build a massize factory just to keep your reactor running. The rods are duplicated through crafting recipes, where if you put 1 uranium or graphite rod in a crafting table, it outputs 2.
